title: PJTSAU Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU)
short_info: Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU) Field Investigator Notification 2026 has been released on 19 May 2026 on the official website pjtsau.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the PJTSAU Field Investigator Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the PJTSAU recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU) recruitment is Field Investigator.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Field Investigator post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Field Investigator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated pay of Rs. 19,500 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B. Sc. (Ag.) or a Diploma in Agriculture to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Field Investigator position is scheduled for 30 May 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant documents mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Field Investigator role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Walk-in Interview venue?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at the PJTSAU office in Adilabad, Telangana, with the pincode 504002.
